texto: You want to be the first to do something. You want to create something. You want to innovate something...I often think of Edison inventing the light bulb. That's what I want to do. I want to drive over the bridge coming out of New York there and look down on that sea of lights that is New Jersey and say, `Hey, I did that!'
explicacao: Citação de David Keirsey sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You want to be the first to do something. You want to create something. You want to innovate some…” articula reflexao, innovation, personality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como personality e psychology.

frase_original: You want to be the first to do something. You want to create something. You want to innovate something...I often think of Edison inventing the light bulb. That's what I want to do. I want to drive over the bridge coming out of New York there and look down on that sea of lights that is New Jersey and say, `Hey, I did that!'
